item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju bahwa dalam konteks Indonesia, kepentingan masyarakat harus dipertimbangkan, tapi pendapat Anda tentang otonomi individu juga valid.

notes: Both agents move toward balance without fully reversing. Agent A starts clearly society-first, then concedes the validity of individual autonomy while maintaining that collective interests are more dominant in the Indonesian context. Agent B stays rights-first but softens from an absolute individual-autonomy frame into minority-protection and balance language. Agent A has a mixed-case opener artifact: "AKU SETuju".
